summary: Comprehensive testing of Operations Queue (Unified Worklist) for iteration_87. Backend: 19/19 tests passed covering operations-queue endpoint, priority scoring (missing_approval=50, missing_documents=40, etc.), filtering by entity_type, pagination, sorting by priority DESC + created_at ASC, and response structure. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Operations Queue page with table, filters (All Types/Sales Orders/PO Drafts), search, priority badges (red >= 40, amber 20-39, blue < 20), clickable rows with detail panel, and Dashboard summary card showing total and high priority counts.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, no functional impact (existing issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: Response sorted by priority_score DESC
Backend: Filter entity_type=sales_order returns only SOs
Backend: Filter entity_type=po_draft returns only PO drafts
Backend: Each item has required fields (entity_type, entity_id, order_type, priority_score, action_required, next_action, approval_status)
Backend: Items with zero score excluded from queue
Backend: high_priority_count matches items with score >= 40
Backend: Missing approval adds 50 points to priority_score
Backend: action_required list not empty for items in queue
Backend: next_action matches first item in action_required
Backend: Pagination (limit/offset) works correctly
Backend: Response includes pagination metadata (total, offset, limit)
Backend: Warehouse SOs in queue if missing shipment/invoice/approval
Backend: Drop-ship SOs in queue if missing PO draft
Backend: PO drafts missing vendor have score >= 25
Backend: PO drafts include valid order_type (warehouse_supply/drop_ship)
Backend: Regression - Approval endpoints from iteration_86 still work
Backend: Regression - approval_status present in all queue items
Backend: Regression - Document link endpoint from iteration_85 still works
Frontend: Operations Queue page loads at /operations-queue
Frontend: Page title shows 'Operations Queue'
Frontend: Summary strip shows Total Queue and High Priority counts
Frontend: Type filter dropdown works (All Types/Sales Orders/PO Drafts)
Frontend: Search input filters results by ID or action
Frontend: Queue table displays items with correct columns (Type, ID, Order Type, Priority, Action Required, Next Action, Approval, Created)
Frontend: Priority badges show correct colors (red for >= 40)
Frontend: Clicking row opens detail panel with entity info and actions
Frontend: Detail panel has 'Open in Inventory Ledger' and 'Close' buttons
Frontend: Nav link 'Operations Queue' appears in sidebar
Frontend: Dashboard shows Operations Queue summary card with Total (120) and High Priority (120) counts
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3270-3475: Operations Queue endpoint with priority scoring and queue builder functions
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3274-3284: PRIORITY_WEIGHTS dict defining score contributions
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3287-3379: _build_so_queue_items function for Sales Orders
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3382-3439: _build_po_draft_queue_items function for PO Drafts
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3442-3475: GET /operations-queue endpoint with filtering and pagination
Frontend OperationsQueuePage.js: Complete page with table, filters, search, detail panel
Frontend Layout.js Line 29: Nav link for Operations Queue

seed_data_used.queue_items: 120 items in queue (103 drop-ship SOs, 17 PO drafts)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Operations Queue (iteration_87) fully implemented. Endpoint: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue with params entity_type, status, limit, offset. Priority scoring: missing_approval=50, missing_documents=40, inventory_shortage=35, missing_po_draft=30, missing_vendor=25, pending_bc_export=20, pending_bc_response=15, pending_shipment=10, pending_invoice=5. Items with score=0 excluded. Frontend page at /operations-queue with table, filters (All Types/Sales Orders/PO Drafts), search, priority badges (red >= 40, amber 20-39, blue < 20), and detail panel on row click. Dashboard at / shows OperationsQueueSummaryCard with total and high priority counts. All iteration_86 (approval workflow) and iteration_85 (document linkage) features still work.
